title: Errors in Verilating RTL or wrong SystemC version?

features.name: large unpacked array of SystemC signal ports with bitwise operations
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array (exceeding 1000 elements) of SystemC signal ports used in bitwise AND, OR, XOR, and shift operations

features.name: partial assignment to SystemC signal via bit manipulation
features.description: Code should include a partial assignment to a SystemC signal port where the right-hand side involves bit masking and shifting operations on the same signal

features.name: SystemC signal array indexed access with compound bitwise operators
features.description: Code should include indexed access to an unpacked array of SystemC signal ports combined with compound bitwise assignment operators (&=, |=, ^=) and shift operations
